session.user:
Run ruff check --fix on src/, packages/, and tests/ directories, then run ruff format on the same directories. Report any errors or issues found.
Commands to run: 1. ruff check --fix src/ packages/ tests/ 2. ruff format src/ packages/ tests/
Report the results of both commands.
session.assistant: I'll run both ruff commands on the specified directories and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check --fix src/ packages/ tests/
Run ruff check with --fix on src, packages, and tests

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format src/ packages/ tests/
Run ruff format on src, packages, and tests

session.tool_result:

... [60 lines omitted] ...
1013 | # Should raise UserFacingCliError Found 7 errors.
session.assistant:
## Results Summary
**ruff check --fix**: Failed with 7 line-length errors (E501)
**ruff format**: Passed - 3 files reformatted, 1651 files left unchanged
### Detailed Findings
#### ruff check --fix: 7 Line-Length Violations Found (E501)
The check command found 7 lines exceeding the 100-character limit that cannot be automatically fixed by `--fix`:
1. **tests/commands/pr/test_list.py:652:101** — Line too long (101 > 100) - `github = FakeLocalGitHub(issues_data=[plan_to_issue(planned_plan), plan_to_issue(impl_plan)])`
2. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_store_tripwire_candidates.py:63:101** — Line too long (101 > 100) - `ctx = ErkContext.for_test(github=FakeLocalGitHub(issues_gateway=fake_issues), repo_root=tmp_path)`
3. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_store_tripwire_candidates.py:88:101** — Line too long (101 > 100) - `ctx = ErkContext.for_test(github=FakeLocalGitHub(issues_gateway=fake_issues), repo_root=tmp_path)`
4. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_store_tripwire_candidates.py:190:101** — Line too long (101 > 100) - `ctx = ErkContext.for_test(github=FakeLocalGitHub(issues_gateway=fake_issues), repo_root=tmp_path)`
5. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_store_tripwire_candidates.py:221:101** — Line too long (101 > 100) - `ctx = ErkContext.for_test(github=FakeLocalGitHub(issues_gateway=fake_issues), repo_root=tmp_path)`
6. **tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_store_tripwire_candidates.py:254:101** — Line too long (101 > 100) - `ctx = ErkContext.for_test(github=FakeLocalGitHub(issues_gateway=fake_issues), repo_root=tmp_path)`
7. **tests/unit/cli/test_navigation_helpers.py:1011:101** — Line too long (105 > 100) - `ctx = context_for_test(git=git, github=FakeLocalGitHub(), cwd=repo_root, global_config=global_config)`
#### ruff format: Successful
The format command completed successfully, reformatting 3 files: - 3 files reformatted - 1651 files left unchanged
